decision.summary: No open position needs management and no new BTC market offers a playbook-compliant edge right now.
decision.rationale: The latest 2026-04-08 Beecthor transcript and recent summaries keep the macro thesis bearish but the immediate path bullish toward roughly 74k before renewed downside, and Binance still confirms that short-term upside bias at 71816.03 after a strong 24h advance. There are no live open positions to close or reduce. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest upside markets are 73k Apr 8 at 23.5% and 74k Apr 6-12 at 44.5%; both are below the configured 0.50 minimum, with 73k too discounted and 74k still not priced attractively enough, so no new position should be opened.
